hardware.unifiedMemoryNote: Apple silicon uses unified memory; this report records host memory facts, not workload capacity.

versionObservation.note: Apple container version came from an injected report snapshot.

workloadProfile.name: Local AI workload memory-pressure study
notes: Describes future measurement inputs for unified-memory pressure.
Does not enable GPU, ANE, Metal, Core ML, MLX, or accelerator scheduling.

memoryPressure.note: Host physical memory is recorded; per-workload memory pressure requires a bounded benchmark run.

bootLatency.note: Container boot latency is not measured by doctor because doctor does not create or start containers.

pollingOverhead.note: Polling overhead requires a timed observation loop and is not inferred from a single snapshot.

sleepWake.note: Sleep/wake behavior requires a controlled long-running runtime proof and is not inferred from local facts.

battery.note: Battery behavior requires a controlled battery run and is not inferred from local facts.

thermal.note: Thermal state is the current host process snapshot and is not a workload capacity guarantee.

architectureWarnings.message: Image architecture linux/amd64 may require Rosetta translation on Apple silicon; verify performance before relying on it.

limits: No production density or capacity guarantee.
No GPU, ANE, Metal, Core ML, MLX, or accelerator scheduling support.
No telemetry upload; reports are local diagnostics only.
No runtime mutation, image pull, or container lifecycle action.
